programs.title: Grand Designs Australia
programs.desc: Natalie and Stuart bought their 1980s bungalow with a promise to preserve its soul. Will a statement shipping container swimming pool make too much of a splash?

programs.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programs.desc: The discovery of mummified remains leads Murdoch on a forensic odyssey to a very old murder/love story. Crabtree's niece Penny arrives in town and her erratic behaviour becomes a distraction.

programs.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programs.desc: We follow reunited siblings, Geoffrey Tonks and Barbara Jacobs, as they investigate a family mystery and try to trace a missing sister.

programs.title: Antiques Roadshow
programs.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team weigh anchor at the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth for another busy day. Objects exciting the experts include a relic from HMS Victory and a mystery device once used to make explosions.

programs.title: Hard Quiz
programs.desc: Tom Gleeson's Big Brass Mug is under siege from four contestants and their eclectic expert subjects: Disney's Encanto, artist Brett Whiteley, musician George Harrison, and the Bear Grylls adventure series Man vs Wild.

programs.title: ABC News
programs.desc: News from where we live. ABC News Victoria brings you the day's top stories, exclusive investigations and original reporting on the issues that matter to you. Presented by Tamara Oudyn (Sun-Thu) and Iskhandar Razak (Fri-Sat).
